page.unemploymentNote: Japan maintains one of the lowest unemployment rates among OECD countries. Tokyo's labour market, as the national economic engine, typically sits below the country average.
page.executiveSummaryText: Tokyo is the world's most populous metropolitan area and one of the most economically significant, generating over 21% of Japan's GDP. It maintains one of the lowest crime rates among major global cities, a life expectancy ranking among the world's highest, and an internationally recognized education system. Despite Japan's demographic decline, Tokyo continues to attract record levels of domestic and international migration.
